Eldad Fux,eldad@appwrite.io,Appwrite,appwrite.io,https://www.linkedin.com/in/eldadfux/,Founder & CTO,Score: 0,0,Cold
Dan Buch,dan@replicate.com,Replicate,replicate.com,https://www.linkedin.com/in/dbuch/,Staff Software Engineer,Score: 0,0,Cold`;

const lines = csv.trim().split('\n');
const headers = lines[0].split(',');

return lines.slice(1).map(line => {
  const values = line.split(',');
  const obj = {};
  headers.forEach((h, i) => {
    obj[h.trim()] = (values[i] || '').trim();
  });
  obj.score = parseInt(obj.score) || 0;
  obj.processed_at = new Date().toISOString();
  return { json: obj };
});

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "prompt": "Write a cold email to {{ $json.name }}, who is {{ $json.title }} at {{ $json.company }} for P95.AI an API latency monitoring tool. Under 100 words. Pitch a 15-min call. Sign off as Team at P95.AI. Return ONLY the email body.",
  "stream": false,
  "name": "{{ $json.name }}",
  "email": "{{ $json.email }}",
  "company": "{{ $json.company }}",
  "title": "{{ $json.title }}",
  "tier": "{{ $json.tier }}",
  "score": "{{ $json.score }}"
}

={
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "prompt": "Write a cold email to {{ $json.name }}, who is {{ $json.title }} at {{ $json.company }} for P95.AI. Focus on alert fatigue and on-call burnout. P95.AI uses AI to detect only real API degradation so engineers stop getting paged for nothing. Under 100 words. Pitch a 15-min demo. Sign off as Team at P95.AI. Return ONLY the email body.",
  "stream": false,

}

  "stream": false,
  "name": "{{ $json.name }}",
  "email": "{{ $json.email }}",
  "company": "{{ $json.company }}",
  "title": "{{ $json.title }}",
  "tier": "{{ $json.tier }}",

}

={
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "prompt": "Write a very light touch intro email to {{ $json.name }}, who is {{ $json.title }} at {{ $json.company }} for P95.AI an API monitoring tool. No hard ask. Just introduce P95.AI in one sentence and offer to share a free benchmark report. Under 80 words. Sign off as Team at P95.AI. Return ONLY the email body.",
  "stream": false,
  "name": "{{ $json.name }}",
  "email": "{{ $json.email }}",
  "company": "{{ $json.company }}",
  "title": "{{ $json.title }}",
  "tier": "{{ $json.tier }}",
  "score": "{{ $json.score }}"
}
